header.headline: Qwen Layer Dataflow
header.subtitle: A compact left-to-right view of the dominant compute path through one layer.

tokens.title: Token State
tokens.body: Normalized token features enter the layer.

mix.title: Projection Mix
mix.body: Fold the attended representation back into the model width.

mlp.title: MLP Block
mlp.body: Gate, expand, and compress token features.

residual.title: Residual Output
residual.body: The layer returns an updated token state for the next block.

footer.note: This family is useful because many architecture assets are really structured dataflow diagrams.
